message:
Add metamorphic tests for fr-persist RDB/AOF encoding

Adds 9 new metamorphic relation tests covering:
- Encoding determinism (same data produces identical bytes)
- AOF concatenation equivalence (encode(a++b) == encode(a)++encode(b))
- RDB entry order invariance (shuffling entries produces same output)
- RDB checksum consistency (stored checksum matches computed)
- AOF subset preservation (prefix decodes to prefix)
- RDB aux field independence (aux fields don't affect entries)
- Empty input identity (empty encodes to empty)
- Single record isolation (single record round-trips)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
